text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of Narita Brian's debut is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A smile forms on Narita Brian's face at the
prospect of competing with so many other racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking forward to a battle that she can actually
enjoy, she heads to the race.
